content: New employees should set up their laptop, company email, chat account, password manager, and development environment during the first week.
how many times should be review in PR?
Based on the engineering handbook, every pull request should be reviewed by at least one teammate before merging.
how many times the pull request should be reviewed?
Every pull request should be reviewed by at least one teammate before merging.
